title: Resource-Controlled Scaling Laws for Noisy Variational Quantum Neural Networks (VQNNs): Reproducibility Artifacts
description: Submission package and reproducibility artifacts for an IEEE Access manuscript on information-theoretic scaling laws for noisy VQNNs with a control-resource model. Includes final manuscript (PDF/LaTeX/Word), publication-ready figures, and CSV tables for parameter grid, fitted coefficients, and budget/control analysis. This release adds calibration-uncertainty (p±10%) sensitivity and an alternative wall-clock budget proxy robustness check.

creators.name: Jung, Hongmin
creators.affiliation: Laurel Springs School, Ojai, CA, USA

notes: After acceptance, replace placeholders with the final GitHub URL, Zenodo record ID, affiliation, and the IEEE Access DOI assigned to the article.
